payload.label: toaster
payload.long_description: Close-up of a small stainless-steel two-slot tabletop toaster with reflective chrome finish and visible top slot openings; the appliance is partially cut off by the crop edge, shows surface reflections and slight smudging, and appears photographed at close range (~0.6 meters).

message.content: {"label":"toaster","short_description":"stainless-steel two-slot toaster (partial)","long_description":"Close-up of a small stainless-steel two-slot tabletop toaster with reflective chrome finish and visible top slot openings; the appliance is partially cut off by the crop edge, shows surface reflections and slight smudging, and appears photographed at close range (~0.6 meters).","attributes":["stainless steel","reflective/chrome finish","two-slot","top slots visible","partial/edge-cropped","tabletop appliance","close-up (~0.6 m)","dim lighting/shadows","minor surface smudges"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
